productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Charcoal Black Striped Trousers
description: Style Note Cut and tailored from a premium quality blend, this trouser from mark taylor will see you through your workday in sophisticated style. Wear it with a crisp tailored shirt and add on a well cut blazer for a look that exudes total confidence and style. Product Details Black striped trousers with brownish tinge made of polyester viscose blended fabric, has a flat front, two slant pockets in front, two welt back pockets with buttoned closures, waistband with belt loops and a zipper fly with snap and button closure, adjustable hem Material and Care Polyester viscose blend Machine wash coldMedium iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
